payments for other (non-acute) hospitalizations for the beneficiary, this field must be added to the total 
Medicare payment amount for other hospitalizations. 

These “other” inpatient (OIP) claims are a subset of the claims in the IP data file consisting of data from 
IP settings such as long-term care hospitals, inpatient psychiatric facilities, inpatient rehabilitation 
facilities, and other types of IP facilities such as children’s hospitals or cancer centers.
